title: calpidia rostrata
intro: Calpidia rostrata, also known as the "Devil's Claw," is a plant that belongs to the family Apocynaceae and is native to various parts of Africa. The medicinal properties of Calpidia rostrata are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include relieving arthritis, back pain, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as reducing fever and improving digestion. The herbal preparations of Calpidia rostrata include teas, capsules, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and wellness.
